title: agnesia amapana
side_effects: Agnesia amapana can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, which can lead to dehydration and electrolyte imbalances. Prolonged use or excessive dosage can also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, affecting the individual's overall quality of life. In rare cases, improper use of the plant can result in more severe consequences, such as liver damage or respiratory problems. It is essential to consult with a medical professional before using agnesia amapana for any health benefits.
